_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: The fluorescein di-β-D-galactopyranoside (FDG) based flow cytometry analysis also showed an increased number of LacZ+ osteoblasts in CKO cultures
details: Flow cytometry analysis showed increased number of LacZ+ osteoblasts in CKO cultures using fluorescein di-β-D-galactopyranoside (FDG) based analysis
